title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Big Bazaar

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Big Bazaar
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Big Bazaar! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Ghaziabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Big Bazaar:
Big Bazaar is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Big Bazaar!
